name: Garden Hose End Cap
description: Caps 3/4in garden hose end to prevent debris entry during storage
notes: Verify thread: US standard 3/4-11.5 NH (garden hose thread)

name: Drip Irrigation T-Stake
description: Combined drip-line guide and garden stake clip for 1/4in tubing
notes: Use PETG minimum for outdoor exposure

name: Rain Barrel Overflow Diverter
description: Routes overflow from rain barrel away from foundation
notes: Check inner diameter to match barrel outlet

name: Soaker Hose End Plug
description: Plug for sealing open end of soaker hose

name: PEX Pipe Clip 16mm
description: Support clip for 16mm OD PEX gravity drainage and greywater
notes: Non-pressure drainage only; never use on pressurised lines

name: PEX to PVC Transition Guide
description: Guide sleeve to neaten PEX-to-PVC gravity-feed connections
notes: Cosmetic/guide only - not a structural coupling

name: Greenhouse Poly Film Clip 22mm
description: Secures polyethylene film to 22mm EMT conduit hoops
notes: Print 20+ per hoop; replace annually or when brittle

name: Row Cover Hoop Anchor Stake
description: Pushes into soil to anchor 9mm row-cover hoops

name: Weatherproof Plant Label
description: Print flat - write with UV-permanent marker or laser-engrave
notes: PETG lasts 3-5 seasons; PLA fades and cracks in < 1 season

name: Trellis Netting Corner Anchor
description: Corner anchor for poly trellis netting; mounts on T-post or stake

name: Gamma Seal Lid Carry Handle
description: Snap-on carry handle for Gamma Seal lids (standard size)

name: 5-Gallon Bucket Spigot Drill Guide
description: Drill guide for consistent 7/8in spigot hole placement

name: IBC Tote Strainer Insert 2in
description: Debris strainer insert for standard 2in IBC tote outlet valve
notes: Print at 50%+ infill; replace if warped or cracked

name: Hex Bolt Drawer Insert M3-M8
description: Tray insert sized for M3 through M8 hex bolts with dividers

name: 1/4in Pegboard Tool Hook (5-pack)
description: Standard 1/4in pegboard hooks in 25 / 50 / 75mm reach sizes

name: Snap-Lock Bit Holder Strip
description: Magnetic / friction-fit screwdriver bit holder strip for wall mount

name: Solar Panel Aluminium Frame Clip
description: Side-mount clip for 35mm solar panel frame onto 40x40mm unistrut
notes: ASA preferred for UV stability; verify panel frame width

name: MC4 Dust Cap Pair
description: Pair of protective dust caps for unused MC4 solar connectors
notes: ASA or PETG only - outdoors UV exposed

name: 12V Battery Terminal Insulator Cover
description: Safety insulator for exposed 12V AGM/lithium battery terminals
notes: CRITICAL safety item - verify fit before use; 60% infill minimum

name: 1/2in EMT Conduit Saddle Clip
description: Single-screw wall saddle for 1/2in EMT (16mm OD) conduit

name: Spring-Loaded Coop Door Latch
description: Simple spring-loaded latch for chicken coop pop-door
notes: Not predator-proof; use metal latch for predator exclusion

name: Horizontal Nipple Waterer Manifold
description: Connects 3 horizontal nipples to 1/2in PVC for gravity waterer
notes: Gravity-feed only (<5 PSI); test for leaks before use with birds

name: Egg Carton Stack Separator
description: Separator tabs to prevent fragile egg carton stacks from collapsing
notes: PLA acceptable - indoor barn use only

name: Heat Lamp Cord Strain Relief
description: Cord strain relief for brooder heat lamp cords at fixture

name: Trailer Stabiliser Jack Foot Pad 150mm
description: Wide pad extends stabiliser jack footprint on soft ground
notes: Stabilizer support only - never under a load/lift jack point

name: Tow Ball Dust Cover 1-7/8in
description: Weather cover for stored 1-7/8in trailer hitch ball
notes: Also search 2in variant for larger balls

name: Truck Bed D-Ring Anchor
description: Printable anchor for organizing strap ends in truck bed
notes: Organizer only - never rely on printed parts for cargo retention

name: Heltec LoRa V3 Meshtastic Enclosure
description: Compact weatherproof case for Heltec WiFi LoRa 32 V3 Meshtastic node
notes: Widely used; check for battery-cutout variant for 18650 cell; use PETG for outdoor nodes

name: SMA Bulkhead Panel with Labels
description: Labelled bulkhead panel for multi-port SMA/RP-SMA connectors

name: Davis-Compatible Rain Gauge Mount
description: Pole/fence bracket for tipping bucket rain gauge
notes: ASA preferred for longevity in UV

name: Weatherstation Cable Gland Housing
description: Printable housing for 16mm cable glands on sensor enclosures
